note: Each scenario is backed by a passing xUnit test (ModelDrivenRunnerTests + AgentRunnerTests). The model-driven loop uses a FAKE planner in tests (no real-model dependency); a real local model would only propose plans, which are then risk-assessed, sandboxed, build/test-gated, and rolled back on failure.
honest: This is a SAFE validated-patch loop, not an unattended autonomous agent: it proposes -> validates deterministically -> applies in isolation -> rolls back; a human still approves before anything reaches the main repo.
